SELECT space(n) AS spaces FROM test_space WHERE n >= 0;
SELECT space(n) FROM (SELECT n FROM test_space) t WHERE n < 10;
SELECT space(3) AS three_spaces, space(0) AS no_spaces, space(-1) AS negative_spaces;
SELECT space(t.n) AS spaces FROM (SELECT n FROM test_space) t JOIN (SELECT 2 AS multiplier) m ON t.n = m.multiplier * 1;
SELECT space(n) FROM (SELECT n FROM test_space WHERE n IS NOT NULL) t CROSS JOIN (SELECT 4 AS repetitions) r;
SELECT space(ABS(n)) AS absolute_space FROM test_space;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT space(n) FROM test_space) AS space_results WHERE length(space(n)) > 0;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_space) AS total_rows SELECT space(total_rows) AS spaces_count;
SELECT space(n + 1) FROM test_space WHERE n = (SELECT MAX(n) FROM test_space);
